financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The bank made a lot more money and grew its business, which is a good sign.
They had some trouble with certain loans, but they fixed it by being more careful with lending.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The bank is handling risks well by tightening loan rules, which helps reduce problems with personal loans.
They are improving technology and digital services to fix past issues and grow their business.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay in areas like social responsibility but has room for improvement.
Their management and decision-making practices are decent but not outstanding.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke with confidence about their plans and how they handle challenges.
They stayed positive and assured even when asked tough questions by analysts.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared clear details about past performance but was unclear about future plans.
Some questions were only partly answered, making it hard to understand their future strategy.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The bank is doing well in some areas like investments and managing costs, which is a good sign.
There are some challenges, but the bank's leaders are working hard to keep things on track.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The bank is doing well because it has adapted to challenges and focused on customer needs, which helps it grow.
There are some risks from global issues and interest rates, but the bank's diverse services help balance these concerns.
